changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Fix page order for Pathology Laboratory notebook template and instances

update.where: title = 'Sample Creation & Metadata Capture' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Sample Quality Control' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Sample Processing & Aliquoting' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Testing, Staining & Microscopy' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Storage & Inventory Management' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Reporting & Performance Monitoring' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Disposal & Archiving' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')
title = 'Reference & SOP Module' AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory')

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology
changeSet.comment: Re-apply page order fix for Pathology Laboratory notebook (v2)
